zh.lifeSummary: 當Meurig Meyrick ap Llywellyn於1483年出生在威爾士安格萊波多爾根時，他的父親Llewellyn ap Heylin39歲，母親Angharad ferch Gwilym or William26歲。他於1502年與Margaret verch Roland在英國威爾斯安格萊波迪德結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1538年11月30日在他的家鄉享年55歲。

nameMeanings.name: Meyrick
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Welsh:  see  Merrick  .

variants.name: Merrick
meanings: Welsh: from the personal name Meuric, the Middle Welsh form of Maurice (see Morris ).
Irish: borrowed from Welsh. In Ireland, when this is not the Welsh name, it might be adopted for Irish Ó Mearadhaigh, see Merry 2.

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Dutch: occupational name for a cobbler.
Slovenian: nickname for a talkative person, from lapati ‘to babble’, or a topographic name from dialect lap ‘abyss’. Compare Lapp 4.

variants.name: Lapp
meanings: German, English, and Dutch: from Middle High German and Middle English lappe, Middle Dutch lap ‘cloth, patch, rag’, a metonymic occupational name for a mender of clothes or shoes, or a nickname given to someone who wore ragged clothes or garments with loose folds, flaps, or hanging sleeves, or who had fleshy folds of skin on his face, neck, or body.

German: nickname for a simple-minded person, from Middle Low German lappe ‘fool’. This surname (in any of the two possible senses; see also 1 above) is also found in France (mainly Alsace, also Lorraine).
English: nickname from Anglo-Norman French lappe ‘burdock’, perhaps for someone with a prickly character.

nameMeanings.name: Llywellyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Welsh: from the personal name Llywelyn, derived from British Celtic Lugubelinos, itself from the divine name Lugus + an uncertain second element often used alone as a name. Through association with llew ‘lion’, it was altered to Llewelyn. This was the name of two princes of north Wales who held the Normans at bay for many years in the 13th century. Etymologically speaking, the form with a fourth -l- is an error, not found as an original Welsh name, but this is now much the most common spelling in the US.

variants.name: Lewelling
meanings: Altered form of Welsh   Llewellyn  .

variants.name: Lewellen
meanings: Altered form of Welsh   Llewellyn  .

variants.name: Lewallen
meanings: Altered form of Welsh   Llewellyn  .

variants.name: Louallen
meanings: Altered form of Welsh Llewelyn (see Llewellyn ).

variants.name: Luellen
meanings: Altered form of Welsh   Llewellyn  .

variants.name: Welling
meanings: English: habitational name from Welwyn (Hertfordshire) or Welling in Bexley (Kent), with a suspicion of an alternative unidentified source. The Hertfordshire placename means ‘at the willow trees’, from Old English wel(i)gum, dative plural form of welig ‘willow’. The Kent placename may derive from Old English wella ‘well, spring, stream’ + the placename forming suffix -ing. In some cases this name may represent a development of Llewellyn , particularly near the Welsh border.
German: habitational name from any of various places in the Rhineland called Welling or Wellingen.

variants.name: Luallen
meanings: Altered form of Welsh   Llewellyn  .

variants.name: Lewellyn
meanings: Altered form of Welsh   Llewellyn  .

variants.name: Llewelyn
meanings: Welsh: variant of   Llewellyn  .

nameMeanings.name: Meurig
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Mauricius via Old Welsh Mouric. See Maurice .

variants.name: Meuric
meanings: From Latin Mauricius via Old Welsh Mouric. See Maurice .

en.lifeSummary: When Meurig Meyrick ap Llywellyn was born in 1483, in Bodorgan, Anglesey, Wales, his father, Llewellyn ap Heylin, was 39 and his mother, Angharad ferch Gwilym or William, was 26. He married Margaret verch Roland in 1502, in Bodedern, Anglesey, Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 30 November 1538, in his hometown, at the age of 55.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Meurig Meyrick ap Llywellyn est né en 1483, à Bodorgan, Anglesey, Galles, son père, Llewellyn ap Heylin, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Angharad ferch Gwilym or William, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Margaret verch Roland en 1502, à Bodedern, Anglesey, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 30 novembre 1538, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 55 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Meurig Meyrick ap Llywellyn 1483 in Bodorgan, Anglesey, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Llewellyn ap Heylin 39 und seine Mutter Angharad ferch Gwilym or William 26. Er hat 1502 in Bodedern, Anglesey, Wales, United Kingdom Margaret verch Roland geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 30. November 1538 im Alter von 55 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

ko.lifeSummary: Meurig Meyrick ap Llywellyn(이)가 1483년 웨일스 앤글레시 보도르건에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Llewellyn ap Heylin(은)는 39세였고, 그의 어머니 Angharad ferch Gwilym or William(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1502년 영국 웨일스 앤글레시 보데더에서 Margaret verch Roland(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1538년 11월 30일 그의 고향에서 55세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Meurig Meyrick ap Llywellyn родился в 1483 г. в местности бодорган, англеси, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Llewellyn ap Heylin было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Angharad ferch Gwilym or William, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret verch Roland в 1502 г. в местности бодедирн, англеси, Уэльс, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер 30 ноября 1538 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 55 лет.
